title: VoidShop
description: A minimal customizable shop plugin using eyes of ender as currency.
body:
VoidShop

VoidShop is a lightweight and immersive ShopGUI plugin that reimagines Minecraft trading by introducing Eyes of Ender as the core currency. Instead of relying on complex economy systems or external dependencies, VoidShop keeps your server’s economy simple, intuitive, and fully customizable.

🛒 What VoidShop Offers
	•	Simple & Intuitive GUI – Players can open a clean, organized shop menu with a single command. No confusing commands or bulky systems, just straightforward trading.
	•	Unique Currency System – Eyes of Ender become the lifeblood of your server’s economy. Every trade, every item, every deal revolves around this rare and valuable item, making shopping feel more meaningful.
	•	Full Customization – Server owners have complete control. Add new items, adjust prices, or create entire categories through a straightforward configuration file. VoidShop adapts to your vision, whether you’re running a survival SMP, semi-anarchy world, or custom roleplay server.
	•	Lightweight & Reliable – No extra economy plugins, no clutter. Just a fast and simple shop system designed to get players trading immediately.

🎨 Why VoidShop?

VoidShop isn’t just another shop plugin — it’s a way to give your players a unique economy that feels tied to the game’s lore. By making Eyes of Ender the currency, trades carry weight and encourage exploration, farming, and strategy. It’s the perfect balance between simplicity and immersion.
